howItWorks.intro: This gaming chair ergonomic calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What is the correct gaming chair height?
faq.answer: Your feet should be flat on the floor with thighs parallel to the ground. Knees should be at approximately 90 degrees. Most people need a seat height of 16-21 inches depending on leg length.

faq.question: How far should a gaming monitor be?
faq.answer: The general rule is 1.2x the monitor diagonal. A 27-inch monitor should be about 32 inches away. For ultrawide monitors, increase distance by 20%. Your eyes should align with the top third of the screen.
